decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to its base_record_id 'project_34th-street-transitway-concept', which is the correct registry record. The source (20110118_34th_cac_mtg_minutes) is already in the record's source_ids, and the record alias 'project_34th-street-transitway-20110118-cac3' already covers this observation. The evidence quote references '34 th Street Transitway corridor' which matches the record's project name. No new linking action needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The presentation included a summary of the 34 th Street Transitway corridor and the project goals and objectives
